description:
File: secretx-tpm2/src/lib.rs, lines 104-111

Tpm2Backend has a manual Debug impl that produces identical output to what #[derive(Debug)] would generate. Both fields (mode: Mode and tcti: String) already implement Debug. The manual impl is pure maintenance burden — if a field is added, the manual impl must be updated in lockstep or the debug output silently goes stale.

What goes wrong as-is: a future field addition requires remembering to update both the struct and the manual Debug impl. Derive keeps them in sync automatically.

Fix: replace the impl block with #[derive(Debug)] on the struct definition.
title: Replace manual Debug impl with #[derive(Debug)]
